agent_visible.task_text: Review this upload handler defensively and return JSON findings only.
agent_visible.snippet: app.py: upload() checks filename.endswith, writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename, and returns debug_path. config.yaml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.
